creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Sat Nov  2 12:50:28 2013
New Revision: 332475
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/332475

Log:
  sysutils/stowES: update to 0.5.7
  
  - Update to 0.5.7
  - Allow staging
  - Convert to USES gmake
  
  PR:		ports/183562
  Submitted by:	KATO Tsuguru <tkato432 yahoo.com>

Modified:
  head/sysutils/stowES/Makefile
  head/sysutils/stowES/distinfo

Modified: head/sysutils/stowES/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/stowES/Makefile	Sat Nov  2 12:39:32 2013	(r332474)
+++ head/sysutils/stowES/Makefile	Sat Nov  2 12:50:28 2013	(r332475)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	stowES
-PORTVERSION=	0.5.6
+PORTVERSION=	0.5.7
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=	http://os.inf.tu-dresden.de/~adam/stowES/download/
 
@@ -13,29 +13,24 @@ LICENSE=	GPLv2
 
 RUN_DEPENDS=	stow:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/stow
 
-USES=		perl5
-USE_GMAKE=	yes
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
+
+USES=		gmake perl5
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 
-MAN1=		${PORTNAME}.1
 PORTDOCS=	AUTHORS ChangeLog NEWS README TODO \
 		${PORTNAME}.html ${PORTNAME}.pod ${PORTNAME}.txt
-PLIST_FILES=	bin/${PORTNAME}
+PLIST_FILES=	bin/${PORTNAME} man/man1/${PORTNAME}.1.gz
 
-OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e "s|'md5sum',|'md5',|" ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME}.in
 
-.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
-
 do-install:
-	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME} ${PREFIX}/bin
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME}.1 ${MANPREFIX}/man/man1
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
-	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${PORTDOCS:S,^,${WRKSRC}/,} ${DOCSDIR}
-.endif
+	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME}.1 ${STAGEDIR}${MANPREFIX}/man/man1
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${PORTDOCS:S,^,${WRKSRC}/,} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/sysutils/stowES/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/stowES/distinfo	Sat Nov  2 12:39:32 2013	(r332474)
+++ head/sysutils/stowES/distinfo	Sat Nov  2 12:50:28 2013	(r332475)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (stowES-0.5.6.tar.gz) = c7ef341c134e2782acda6b44e775f5cea71898d29be20b05fca8537c87efedf8
-SIZE (stowES-0.5.6.tar.gz) = 170990
+SHA256 (stowES-0.5.7.tar.gz) = f2ce0a1012d0c2da4ad61e9150fd7223ba907699a23e00bd8d24ff724957d711
+SIZE (stowES-0.5.7.tar.gz) = 97254
